summary: This document outlines a sales engagement strategy for reaching NHS Integrated Care Boards (ICBs) with an AI phone agent solution, though it is stored in a deprecated folder. The content includes specific messaging for different roles like Finance Directors and Clinical Leaders, along with success metrics and risk mitigation plans.
